reason: Agent QA-20260608-175959-w5tn successfully responded to a math question with the correct answer
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Success. App loaded with sidebar displaying agents list.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260608-175959-w5tn" in sidebar — Success. Agent selected and landing page displayed.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Success. Agent status shows "idle" which meets the requirement.
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in message input — Success. Message appears in textbox.
Clicked Send button to submit message — Success. Message sent, agent status changed to "working", activity indicator showed "Working...".
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Success. Agent responded within seconds with the message "4".

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Success. Response clearly shows "4" as the agent's answer to the math question. Screenshot saved as agent-response-verification.png showing the complete conversation.
